typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Rendered indicator assertions in SwitcherCrossFlowTests remain renderability-only (`XCTAssertNotNil`) and do not consume concrete rendered seams (`testActiveProfileDisplayName` / `testActiveProfileAccessibilityLabel`) required to close explicit rendered-indicator failures.
Popover rendered-indicator proof remains renderability-only (`XCTAssertNotNil`) instead of asserting active labels/identifiers via DEBUG seams.

Cross-surface switch evidence still relies on direct store mutation (`localStore.setActiveProfile(...)`) under simulated UI comments, rather than UI callback/action paths required by prior scrutiny findings.
VAL-CROSS-009 launch-chain checks remain store-inference/comment based (`launch adapter would use ...`) and do not assert concrete launch invocation traces from UI action paths.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce handoff compliance so `followedProcedure=true` is only allowed when `verification.commandsRun` includes concrete context-read evidence (Read/Grep/content-inspection commands), not only test execution commands.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both rerun reviews reported missing context-read evidence while handoffs declared `followedProcedure=true`, repeating the same drift previously flagged in integration-hardening scrutiny rounds.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit VAL-CROSS evidence rule: rendered-indicator claims must assert concrete rendered labels/identifiers via seams, and switch/launch claims must be proven through UI action callbacks or adapter invocation traces (not direct store mutation/comments).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The same rendered/store-inference pattern persisted across multiple integration-hardening fix attempts and remains the active blocker in this rerun.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeat recommendation to add context-read evidence discipline to switcher worker handoffs
